name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

A quick look at how things came in yesterday at {{orgName}}. A few new patients reached out, some appointments moved on the calendar, and the team kept things steady — nothing that needs you right this second.

We wanted you to have the lay of the land before the chairs start filling up. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting in your dashboard whenever you're ready.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
